title: How can I recover my account?

search_realxmarket_docs "Recovering an account"

Documentation results:
Account Recovery
================

To recover your account, follow these steps:

1. Go to the login page and click on "Forgot Password".
2. Enter your email address associated with your account.
3. Click on "Send Reset Link".
